overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in an enclosed tunnel before exiting onto a palm-lined coastal highway at sunset. The vehicle navigates winding roads with a futuristic city skyline visible in the distance, passes through an urban corridor with holographic billboards, and re-enters a tunnel. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with warm golden hour lighting transitioning to artificial tunnel lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a well-lit highway tunnel with smooth concrete walls and linear overhead lighting. The vehicle follows a black car ahead while the dashboard displays holographic green readouts. As the segment progresses, the tunnel exit becomes visible ahead with bright daylight streaming in.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens to a wide coastal highway bathed in golden hour sunlight. Tall palm trees line the road while reddish rocky terrain rises on the right. The vehicle navigates gentle curves as a white car overtakes on the left, with the warm sunset sky visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The highway winds through elevated terrain with the futuristic city skyline dominating the horizon. Industrial transmission towers line the left side while the road curves gently. The guard rails shift to the left as the road bends, and the distant skyscrapers grow increasingly prominent against the warm sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway with holographic billboards and dense futuristic architecture

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a dense urban corridor with massive holographic billboards and futuristic skyscrapers lining the highway. A green sports car overtakes on the left as the vehicle approaches a dark tunnel entrance ahead. The lighting shifts from natural sunset to mixed urban illumination from building lights and advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway tunnel with linear overhead lighting

events.description: entering dark tunnel, transitioning from outdoor urban environment to indoor enclosure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark tunnel, transitioning abruptly from the bright urban environment to the enclosed concrete passage. The tunnel walls and overhead fluorescent lights return as the vehicle follows the black car ahead into the illuminated corridor, leaving the city and sunset behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a sterile highway tunnel into a sun-drenched coastal landscape before plunging back into an urban subterranean passage. It begins inside a well-lit tunnel with smooth concrete walls and holographic dashboard readouts, moving forward until the exit opens into a wide coastal highway bathed in golden hour sunlight. As the vehicle navigates gentle curves past tall palm trees and reddish rocky terrain, the scene expands to reveal a futuristic city skyline and industrial transmission towers dominating the horizon. The environment then shifts into a dense urban corridor filled with massive holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers, where the natural sunset light blends with artificial city illumination. Finally, the camera glides through a dark tunnel entrance, abruptly returning to an enclosed concrete corridor with fluorescent overhead lighting as the city is left behind.
